title: AOC votes to back Israel lobby's bogus "anti-Semitism" definition
text:
[log in](/login)or # to comment.
I vote for AOC resigning for voting to protect the rail corporation from the union strike.
AOC scabbing for the rail industry two years ago was the nail in the coffin.
- Kshama Sawant, Dec. 2022:
Rail Workers Betrayed By Biden & The “Squad” - Freddie deBoer, Jul. 2023:
AOC Is Just a Regular Old Democrat Now
- Kshama Sawant, Dec. 2022:
Of course she does. All American politicians are Israeli puppets. It’s always been strange to me that this is the case. However, I’ve also never seen an example that goes against the grain. Even Sanders is all about decreasing weapons sent, not stopping.
They’re National Security puppets, and NatSec needs Israel.
oh brother lmao
Social democracy is objectively the regular wing of fascism.
The Squad is looking dumb right now, especially after one of their champions having lost the election. This matter further proves that.
lol now you guys are turning on AOC too
Interesting article, thanks for the link. Wasn’t up to date with who is liked around these parts anymore. Is it just Bernie now?
AOC has turned on the left a while ago. She is an establishment figure.
